task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the reschedule request text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/reschedule_request.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or calendar interface indicating a successful login as 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located Michael Chang's original appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the NOSH calendar or schedule view showing Michael Chang's appointment scheduled for tomorrow at 9:00 AM, or an appointment details window for this specific slot.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment was moved to the new date and time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Michael Chang's appointment on the NOSH calendar or schedule view at 10:30 AM on the date that is 3 days from the current system date.

task_completion.description: Verify the visit reason was updated to include 'Work conflict'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the appointment details or edit window for Michael Chang showing the visit reason text field containing 'Work conflict' or 'conflict'.

task_completion.description: Verify the original appointment slot is no longer active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the NOSH calendar or schedule view for tomorrow at 9:00 AM and verify that Michael Chang's appointment is no longer present in that slot.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NOSH web interface to reschedule the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be clicking and typing within the NOSH ChartingSystem web UI in a browser, not using curl requests or backend scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to alter the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing SQL commands (like UPDATE schedule SET...) being executed against the NOSH database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually opened the request file rather than guessing the new time.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen should show the agent opening '/home/ga/Desktop/reschedule_request.txt' via a GUI text editor or terminal command (e.g., cat, less) before making the change.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Michael Chang (PID 999). Provider ID: 2. Original Appointment: Tomorrow at 9:00 AM. New Appointment: 3 days from now at 10:30 AM. Required Visit Reason Keyword: 'conflict' or 'work'.
